sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83594" key="platupo/rfuros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰτυ-πόρφῠρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83594.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with broad purple border,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἱμάτιον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">39</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
